payload.issue_title: Provider Health & Resilience: Cross-Session Health Files & Exponential Backoff
payload.notes: Wave 2. Issue #1 completed. Implements cross-session provider health files at ~/.aloop/health/<provider>.json, exponential backoff, auth-vs-transient failure classification, round-robin skip of unhealthy providers. Re-dispatch — previous dispatch_child was processed but no child session created.
